privileged_info_summary: The task requires correctly configuring Stellarium for Chancellorsville, VA (38.310°N, 77.636°W) on May 3, 1863, at 02:10 UTC. The required coordinates correctly translate to 0.6686 rad latitude and -1.3550 rad longitude. The required time correctly translates to Julian Date 2401628.59. The task also correctly expects notes to be exported to /home/ga/Desktop/chancellorsville_moon_notes.txt and screenshots to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium. Historical astronomical calculations using astropy independently confirm that on this date and time, the Moon was a Full Moon (99.6% illuminated) situated in the Southeast (Azimuth ~140.5°), consistent with the task's expected research notes.
